dsl_rule.translation_notes: Belt Hold Bullish reversal pattern: Entry requires close near top of previous candle (close >= prev_high) AND confirmation with higher closing price the next day (close > prev_close). Exit on reversal signal when price closes below the pattern low. Pattern targets downtrend reversals with 96% confirmation rate.

backtest_rule.reason: Belt Hold Bullish reversal pattern: Entry requires close near top of previous candle (close >= prev_high) AND confirmation with higher closing price the next day (close > prev_close). Exit on reversal signal when price closes below the pattern low. Pattern targets downtrend reversals with 96% confirmation rate.

source_rule_text: Belt Hold, Bullish: A reversal pattern confirmed by a higher closing price the next day, indicating price has broken out upward and reversed the downtrend
